response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX/embedded environments, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking or LAN-switch security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, CI/CD infrastructure)
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical education (workshops, libraries)
concerns: No C or embedded firmware development experience in UNIX/Linux environments
Zero evidence of networking security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP, etc.)
No Japanese language proficiency; English is fluent but not sufficient without Japanese
